tool_args.label: MTA Open Data Program page

payload.title: MTA Open Data Program
payload.description: MTA Open Data Program landing page describing the program's commitment, team, and resources

tool_args.label: MTA - Metropolitan Transportation Authority

payload.description: The MTA moves millions of people every day and manages the Open Data Program to share data publicly

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA moves millions of people every day

tool_args.label: MTA Data & Analytics Team

payload.description: The MTA's center of excellence in the management, usage and sharing of data. Manages the Open Data program.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA Open Data program is managed by the Data & Analytics team, the MTA's center of excellence in the management, usage and sharing of data.

tool_args.label: NYS Open Data Portal

payload.description: New York State Open Data Portal at data.ny.gov where MTA submits its public data

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA data on the NYS Open Data Portal data.ny.gov

tool_args.label: Renewed commitment to transparency

payload.claim_text: We have renewed our commitment to transparency and to our obligation to share our data publicly.
payload.statement: MTA renewed its commitment to transparency and data sharing
payload.description: MTA states it has renewed its commitment to transparency and public data sharing under the Open Data Program

evidence_refs.source_quote: We have renewed our commitment to transparency and to our obligation to share our data publicly.

tool_args.label: Open Data Plan aim

payload.claim_text: We aim to share as much data that is in the public interest as we can, and to work with the community to understand their priorities.
payload.statement: MTA aims to share public interest data and work with community priorities
payload.description: Goal of the Open Data program to share data in the public interest and engage the community

evidence_refs.source_quote: We aim to share as much data that is in the public interest as we can, and to work with the community to understand their priorities.

tool_args.label: Four Open Data Program promises

payload.claim_text: We promise to: Submit all data that we already make public on this website to the NYS Open Data Portal. Publish the data that we release via our monthly Board and Committee books. Publish our plan and schedule for sharing to the NYS Open Data Portal all publishable agency data (completed in April 2022). Implement our plan over the next two years.
payload.statement: MTA promises to submit public data to NYS Open Data Portal, publish board data, publish sharing plan, and implement within two years
payload.description: Four commitments under the renewed Open Data Program

evidence_refs.source_quote: We promise to: Submit all data that we already make public on this website to the NYS Open Data Portal. Publish the data that we release via our monthly Board and Committee books. Publish our plan and schedule for sharing to the NYS Open Data Portal all publishable agency data (completed in April 2022). Implement our plan over the next two years.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Data & Analytics team three core functions

payload.claim_text: Our three main functions are to aggregate the MTA's many diverse data sources, to devise and automate creative analyses that uncover the valuable insights in that data, and to share these products and skills.
payload.statement: The Data & Analytics team's three main functions are: aggregate data sources, devise automated analyses, and share products and skills
payload.description: Core functions of the MTA Data & Analytics team

evidence_refs.source_quote: Our three main functions are to aggregate the MTA's many diverse data sources, to devise and automate creative analyses that uncover the valuable insights in that data, and to share these products and skills.

tool_args.label: Data & Analytics team work scope

payload.claim_text: Our work includes building data pipelines to automate processes, calculating performance metrics for subway and bus service, maintaining critical datasets for internal and external use, and providing analytic support for executive leadership, as well as managing the MTA's Open Data program.
payload.statement: Data & Analytics team builds data pipelines, calculates performance metrics, maintains datasets, provides analytic support, and manages Open Data program
payload.description: Scope of work for the Data & Analytics team

evidence_refs.source_quote: Our work includes building data pipelines to automate processes, calculating performance metrics for subway and bus service, maintaining critical datasets for internal and external use, and providing analytic support for executive leadership, as well as managing the MTA's Open Data program.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
